fixed.description: Include HTML template in release (was excluded by `*.html` gitignore rule)

highlights.description: Initial release of Go library for generating Cytoscape.js graph visualizations

added.description: Graph builder with nodes, edges, and metadata
Multiple layout algorithms: Cose, Dagre, Cola, Circle, Grid, Concentric, BreadthFirst, Preset
Standalone HTML generation with embedded JavaScript
Interactive features: search, filters, export (PNG/SVG), layout selector
JSON export in Cytoscape elements format
